productDisplayName: Timberland Women Femmes Blue Casual Shoes
description: Dress to work in style in the Pinkham Oxfords from timberland. With a suede and mesh upper, and a stylish synthetic leather patch, this shoe is designed to offer comfort and style at its best.UpperSuede and mesh upper for ultimate breathable comfort and styleSynthetic leather toe box in a contrast colour for enhanced shoe life and styleLace-up system for a snug, customised FitWide mouth for ease of useFabric inner lining for all-day comfortPadded anti-fatigue foam footbed with a fabric lining for all-day comfortRemovable footbed to accommodate an orthoticMidsoleEVA midsole for all-day comfort and durabilityOutsoleDurable grippy rubber outsole with leaf-shaped lugs throughout the forefoot and midfoot, and has semi-circular grooves on the big toe mound and heel for absolute grip and tractionShoe careWipe dust with a dry, clean clothUse a suede brushDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
